name: VeritasGraph
desc: VeritasGraph — open-source Knowledge Graph & GraphRAG framework on GitHub. Build multi-hop reasoning, ontology-aware retrieval, and verifiable attribution over…
descFull: VeritasGraph — open-source Knowledge Graph & GraphRAG framework on GitHub. Build multi-hop reasoning, ontology-aware retrieval, and verifiable attribution over your own data. Nodes, edges, RDF, linked-data — runs locally or in the cloud.
